title: Tech&Magic
body:
_work in progress_

This modpack for Minecraft challenges players to choose between two powerful forces: **magic** and **technology**.

##  Magic:

- Explore the mysteries of magic by learning and casting spells, creating magical artifacts and summoning mystical creatures.
- Build majestic magical towers using runes and enchantments.
- Fight your enemies with powerful spells and magical weapons.
  
## Technology:

- Conquer the world of technology by creating complex mechanisms, extracting rare resources and controlling powerful machines.
- Build futuristic cities made of metal and glass.
- Use high-tech weapons and armor to dominate your enemies.
  
#    

**Choose your side: magic or technology.**
Fight with players of another faction to gain resources and territories.
Use your unique abilities to gain the upper hand in epic battles.
This modpack offers:

Lots of mods that add magic and technology to the game.
Balanced gameplay that rewards both magic and technology.
New challenges and challenges that will make you rethink the way you play Minecraft.
An incredible world full of secrets and wonders awaits you!
Download the modpack today and choose your side!

## Main mods:
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2/version/fabric-12.9.9)
- [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- [Spellblades and Such](https://modrinth.com/mod/spellblades-and-such)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Dungeon Now Loading](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-now-loading)
- [Jewelry (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
- [TieredZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz)


Additionally:

This modpack is suitable for both single player and online play.
It is regularly updated with new mods and content.

_inspired by MineShield_

~~сборка _Майншилда: Межсезонье_~~
